---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for OpenNapse
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's frustrating about the current experience?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, or anything else that helps explain the request.
